name: Asparagus Roll Ups
recipeInstructions: Cut the crusts from the bread (save the crusts to make croutons). Roll the bread with a rolling pin until quite thin. Brush with melted butter, then sprinkle grated cheese over. Add an asparagus spear near the edge. Roll the bread up around the asparagus so it ends up looking like a cigarette. Cut in half so you'll have two bite-sized pieces from one piece of bread. Place on plastic wrap or foil. Continue with the rest of the bread, asparagus, etc. Seal in the plastic wrap or foil and freeze. When ready to serve, place rolls on a cookie sheet (still frozen) and bake at 375°F for about 20 minutes or until golden brown.
